{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/ai-collaborations/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. ai-collaborations

_Файлов:_ 1

h2. Содержание

* [source-projects.md|source-projects.md] — 

h2. Подразделы

* [candidates/|candidates/] — candidates
* [channels/|channels/] — channels
* [continuation/|continuation/] — continuation
* [ensembles/|ensembles/] — Ансамбли проектов
* [fast-tracks/|fast-tracks/] — fast-tracks
* [strategy/|strategy/] — strategy



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/overview/README.md] (сходство 0.25)
* [README|docs/ai-collaborations/candidates/README.md] (сходство 0.22)
* [README|docs/obsidian/autofilled/README.md] (сходство 0.21)
